message:
ci: Improve GitHub Actions workflows with best practices

CI workflow improvements:
- Add workflow_dispatch for manual triggering
- Add concurrency settings to cancel in-progress runs on same branch/PR
- Add timeout-minutes to all jobs to prevent runaway builds
- Add restore-keys fallback for better cache hit rates
- Use taiki-e/install-action for cargo-audit (faster, cached)
- Add MSRV check job using pinned nightly-2024-11-01 for edition 2024

Release workflow improvements:
- Add workflow_dispatch with tag input for manual releases
- Add concurrency settings to prevent duplicate release runs
- Add Linux ARM64 targets (aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu/musl)
  for Raspberry Pi, AWS Graviton, and ARM servers
- Add cross-compilation support using cross tool for ARM builds
- Add cargo registry caching for faster subsequent builds
- Generate per-file SHA256 checksums alongside aggregated SHA256SUMS
- Add timeout-minutes to all jobs
- Update release notes to list all 7 supported platforms
- Add conditional checks for Homebrew/Scoop token secrets
- Handle both tag push and workflow_dispatch in version extraction

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,10 +5,18 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
   pull_request:
     branches: [main]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+# Cancel in-progress runs for the same branch/PR
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
 
 env:
   CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
   RUSTFLAGS: -D warnings
+  # MSRV from Cargo.toml
+  MSRV: "1.85"
 
 jobs:
   # ==========================================================================
@@ -17,6 +25,7 @@ jobs:
   format:
     name: Format Check
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 10
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -31,6 +40,7 @@ jobs:
   clippy:
     name: Clippy Lints
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 20
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -47,6 +57,9 @@ jobs:
             ~/.cargo/git
             target
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-clippy-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-clippy-
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-
 
       - name: Run Clippy
         # Note: --all-features excluded; alloc-count feature requires unsafe code for profiling
@@ -58,6 +71,7 @@ jobs:
   test:
     name: Tests (${{ matrix.os }})
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 30
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
@@ -77,6 +91,9 @@ jobs:
             ~/.cargo/git
             target
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-test-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-test-
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-
 
       - name: Run tests
         # Note: alloc-count feature excluded (requires unsafe code for profiling)
@@ -88,6 +105,7 @@ jobs:
   docs:
     name: Documentation
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -102,6 +120,9 @@ jobs:
             ~/.cargo/git
             target
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-docs-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-docs-
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-
 
       - name: Check documentation
         # Note: alloc-count feature excluded (requires unsafe code for profiling)
@@ -115,6 +136,7 @@ jobs:
   benchmarks:
     name: Benchmarks
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 20
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -129,6 +151,9 @@ jobs:
             ~/.cargo/git
             target
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-bench-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-bench-
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-
 
       - name: Run benchmarks
         run: cargo bench --bench search_perf -- --noplot --sample-size 10
@@ -140,6 +165,7 @@ jobs:
   coverage:
     name: Code Coverage
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
@@ -159,6 +185,9 @@ jobs:
             ~/.cargo/git
             target
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-coverage-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-coverage-
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-
 
       - name: Generate coverage report
         # Note: alloc-count feature excluded (requires unsafe code for profiling)
@@ -178,6 +207,7 @@ jobs:
   build:
     name: Build (${{ matrix.target }})
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 30
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
@@ -207,6 +237,10 @@ jobs:
             ~/.cargo/git
             target
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-build-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-build-
+            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-
 
       - name: Build release binary
         run: cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
@@ -223,15 +257,47 @@ jobs:
   security:
     name: Security Audit
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust nightly
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - name: Install cargo-audit
-        run: cargo install cargo-audit
+        uses: taiki-e/install-action@cargo-audit
 
       - name: Run security audit
         run: cargo audit
         continue-on-error: true
+
+  # ==========================================================================
+  # MSRV (Minimum Supported Rust Version) Check
+  # ==========================================================================
+  msrv:
+    name: MSRV Check
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 20
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust ${{ env.MSRV }}
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly-2024-11-01
+          # Use a pinned nightly that supports edition 2024
+
+      - name: Cache cargo registry
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/registry
+            ~/.cargo/git
+            target
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-msrv-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-msrv-
+            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-
+
+      - name: Check MSRV compatibility
+        run: cargo check --features parallel-search

@@ -4,6 +4,17 @@ on:
   push:
     tags:
       - 'v*'
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      tag:
+        description: 'Tag to release (e.g., v0.2.1)'
+        required: true
+        type: string
+
+# Cancel in-progress runs for the same tag
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
 
 env:
   CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
@@ -15,25 +26,46 @@ jobs:
   build:
     name: Build ${{ matrix.target }}
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 45
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
         include:
+          # Linux x86_64 (glibc)
           - os: ubuntu-latest
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
             archive: tar.gz
+            cross: false
+          # Linux x86_64 (musl - static binary for Alpine, etc.)
           - os: ubuntu-latest
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
             archive: tar.gz
+            cross: false
+          # Linux ARM64 (glibc - Raspberry Pi, AWS Graviton, etc.)
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            archive: tar.gz
+            cross: true
+          # Linux ARM64 (musl - Alpine on ARM)
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-musl
+            archive: tar.gz
+            cross: true
+          # macOS Intel
           - os: macos-latest
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             archive: tar.gz
+            cross: false
+          # macOS Apple Silicon
           - os: macos-latest
             target: aarch64-apple-darwin
             archive: tar.gz
+            cross: false
+          # Windows x86_64
           - os: windows-latest
             target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
             archive: zip
+            cross: false
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -43,38 +75,70 @@ jobs:
         with:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
 
-      - name: Install musl-tools (Linux musl)
+      - name: Cache cargo registry
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/registry
+            ~/.cargo/git
+            target
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-release-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-release-
+            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.target }}-cargo-
+
+      - name: Install musl-tools (Linux x86_64 musl)
         if: matrix.target == 'x86_64-unknown-linux-musl'
         run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y musl-tools
 
-      - name: Build release binary
+      - name: Install cross (for cross-compilation)
+        if: matrix.cross
+        uses: taiki-e/install-action@cross
+
+      - name: Build release binary (native)
+        if: "!matrix.cross"
         run: cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
 
+      - name: Build release binary (cross)
+        if: matrix.cross
+        run: cross build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+
       - name: Create archive (Unix)
         if: matrix.archive == 'tar.gz'
         run: |
           cd target/${{ matrix.target }}/release
           tar -czf ../../../xf-${{ matrix.target }}.tar.gz xf
           cd ../../..
+          # Generate per-file checksum
+          sha256sum xf-${{ matrix.target }}.tar.gz > xf-${{ matrix.target }}.tar.gz.sha256
 
       - name: Create archive (Windows)
         if: matrix.archive == 'zip'
         shell: pwsh
         run: |
           Compress-Archive -Path target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/xf.exe -DestinationPath xf-${{ matrix.target }}.zip
+          # Generate per-file checksum
+          (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 xf-${{ matrix.target }}.zip).Hash.ToLower() + "  xf-${{ matrix.target }}.zip" | Out-File -Encoding utf8 xf-${{ matrix.target }}.zip.sha256
 
-      - name: Upload artifact
+      - name: Upload archive artifact
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: xf-${{ matrix.target }}
           path: xf-${{ matrix.target }}.${{ matrix.archive }}
 
+      - name: Upload checksum artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: xf-${{ matrix.target }}-sha256
+          path: xf-${{ matrix.target }}.${{ matrix.archive }}.sha256
+
   # ==========================================================================
   # Create GitHub Release
   # ==========================================================================
   release:
     name: Create Release
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
     needs: build
     permissions:
       contents: write
@@ -90,23 +154,37 @@ jobs:
       - name: Prepare release files
         run: |
           mkdir -p release
-          find artifacts -type f \( -name "*.tar.gz" -o -name "*.zip" \) -exec mv {} release/ \;
+          # Move all archives and individual checksums
+          find artifacts -type f \( -name "*.tar.gz" -o -name "*.zip" -o -name "*.sha256" \) -exec mv {} release/ \;
 
-      - name: Generate checksums
+      - name: Generate aggregated checksums
         run: |
           cd release
-          sha256sum * > SHA256SUMS
+          # Generate SHA256SUMS for all archives (excluding individual .sha256 files)
+          sha256sum *.tar.gz *.zip 2>/dev/null | sort > SHA256SUMS || true
+          # Display for verification in logs
+          echo "=== SHA256SUMS ==="
+          cat SHA256SUMS
 
       - name: Extract version from tag
         id: version
-        run: echo "VERSION=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+        run: |
+          # Handle both tag push and manual workflow_dispatch
+          if [ -n "${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}" ]; then
+            VERSION="${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}"
+            VERSION="${VERSION#v}"
+          else
+            VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}"
+          fi
+          echo "VERSION=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
       - name: Create Release
         uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
         with:
+          tag_name: ${{ github.event.inputs.tag || github.ref_name }}
           name: xf v${{ steps.version.outputs.VERSION }}
           draft: false
-          prerelease: ${{ contains(github.ref, '-') }}
+          prerelease: ${{ contains(steps.version.outputs.VERSION, '-') }}
           generate_release_notes: true
           files: |
             release/*
@@ -120,15 +198,21 @@ jobs:
 
             ### Manual Download
             Download the appropriate binary for your platform:
-            - **Linux (x86_64)**: `xf-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz`
-            - **Linux (musl)**: `xf-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz`
-            - **macOS (Intel)**: `xf-x86_64-apple-darwin.tar.gz`
-            - **macOS (Apple Silicon)**: `xf-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz`
-            - **Windows**: `xf-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip`
+            - **Linux x86_64 (glibc)**: `xf-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz`
+            - **Linux x86_64 (musl/static)**: `xf-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz`
+            - **Linux ARM64 (glibc)**: `xf-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz`
+            - **Linux ARM64 (musl/static)**: `xf-aarch64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz`
+            - **macOS Intel**: `xf-x86_64-apple-darwin.tar.gz`
+            - **macOS Apple Silicon**: `xf-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz`
+            - **Windows x86_64**: `xf-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip`
 
             ### Verify Download
             ```bash
-            sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS
+            # Verify using aggregated checksums
+            sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS --ignore-missing
+
+            # Or verify individual file
+            sha256sum -c xf-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz.sha256
             ```
 
             ## What's Changed
@@ -141,11 +225,21 @@ jobs:
   notify-homebrew-tap:
     name: Notify Homebrew Tap
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
     needs: release
+    # Only run if HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN is configured
+    if: ${{ secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN != '' }}
     steps:
       - name: Extract version from tag
         id: version
-        run: echo "version=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+        run: |
+          if [ -n "${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}" ]; then
+            VERSION="${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}"
+            VERSION="${VERSION#v}"
+          else
+            VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}"
+          fi
+          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
       - name: Trigger formula update
         uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
@@ -161,18 +255,28 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Log dispatch
         run: |
-          echo "✅ Dispatched formula-update event to homebrew-tap"
+          echo "Dispatched formula-update event to homebrew-tap"
           echo "   Tool: xf"
           echo "   Version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
 
   notify-scoop-bucket:
     name: Notify Scoop Bucket
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 5
     needs: release
+    # Only run if SCOOP_BUCKET_TOKEN is configured
+    if: ${{ secrets.SCOOP_BUCKET_TOKEN != '' }}
     steps:
       - name: Extract version from tag
         id: version
-        run: echo "version=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+        run: |
+          if [ -n "${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}" ]; then
+            VERSION="${{ github.event.inputs.tag }}"
+            VERSION="${VERSION#v}"
+          else
+            VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}"
+          fi
+          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
       - name: Trigger manifest update
         uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
@@ -188,6 +292,6 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Log dispatch
         run: |
-          echo "✅ Dispatched manifest-update event to scoop-bucket"
+          echo "Dispatched manifest-update event to scoop-bucket"
           echo "   Tool: xf"
           echo "   Version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
